summary: Software engineer with 3+ years building and optimizing high-throughput, production-critical data systems at a global bank — pipelines processing tens of millions of transactions daily. Strong CS/algorithms foundation (Cornell BS), deep Python proficiency, and hands-on fluency with agentic coding workflows and LLM APIs. Drawn to applying AI directly inside the developer workflow for trading systems, and eager to go deeper on agents, MCP servers, retrieval, and evaluation infrastructure.
skills_html:
Languages: Python, SQL, Java (coursework/fundamentals)  |  Data/Systems: Pandas, AMPS message queues, high-throughput pipelines, concurrency, telemetry, Postgres, SQLite, Docker
AI / Agentic: Agentic coding & orchestration, LLM APIs (Gemini), tool-augmented workflows
Practices: Performance optimization, data pipeline design, code review, documentation & communication, Git
projects: Polymarket Scanner (Flask, Discord API, SQLite) — Scans Polymarket for large trades and unusual/potential insider activity, pushing real-time alerts to Discord. Market-microstructure signal detection.
Market Data Dashboard (Grafana, Postgres, Docker, Twilio) — Ingests OI, funding, and other market data from Binance and Hyperliquid APIs; dashboards plus SMS alerts on signal triggers.
Reading Recommendations App (Flask, Gemini API, SQLite) — LLM-powered daily recommender over a Project Gutenberg corpus; takes user preferences and returns a tailored short work each day.
